title: randia calophylla
intro: Randia calophylla, also known as the yellow birdwood or birdwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Randia calophylla include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Randia calophylla is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
